hc8770d3ag162ag4f32g913cgc2eaaf942581: Go to sleep. If another knife awaits in the night, so be it.
hba0cc1a7ga163g4241ga211g4184bac81be8: Betrayed by a drow commander of the Absolute. How unexpected a turn of events.
h45ead9ccg72e0g464egb3dcg05e73c096f74: How does it feel to kill a woman still flush with the warmth of your body? All par for the course for you, I suppose.
hf79d418bgaea7g461cga1cdg3c711e1a9492: But no matter. What's one more kill but a fitting coda to a day of carnage?
h7b4cdcc4g6abag42a2gba85g80d07d28542f: I've said my piece. Now let me dull my tongue with wine.
h0c4fd2b4g5817g4365gafa4g2178ba2f09fb: This is the worst moment. When the screams of the dying have faded, and the conquering hordes howl and yelp as they come to their vile climax.
hebb42745gf248g4a7bgb88egfaf4d01b4cce: Massacre. A spectacle of slaughter. And I participated.
h2e0c0a34g9fbfg4f1bgabe3g3fa5268454df: What are these bloody stumps that used to be such delicate harpists of the Weave?
hd747c750g1e3fg45e3g96fbgc4b72405b4b2: They're the hands they always were. You've a knack for this.
hcb5c10aag0d8ag4b71gabe2gf8aea926b6aa: Two shadows are darkening my soul. The shadow within and the shadow without:
hd382a384g6b63g46b7ga874gd6f7d441541d: You led me down this path.
he385160bgc18dg49b0ga4d9g407908d07094: Yes. And I got you the Idol of Silvanus along the way.
hbc56c111g87cdg4cbegb491g7cfd91144e58: I don't know myself anymore. All this... It's not who I am. Around you, I'm not who I want to be.
h19480fd6gc032g4df9g8eb1gbb67b3e017a6: Precious little love lost between us, isn't there?
h6df04744g5753g4fefgb2bag2cdec1fc08d8: Stay. We make each other stronger. We make each other survive.
hcdfa8ed7g37fbg4e2bg8f66g8b2fc4ad46bd: Yes. Yes, I suppose we do. Few things are more powerful than the will to live.
h0a6a5bd0g1e5dg4db5g977ag20ca4a2d9628: But carnage such as this... The shadow within is spreading like poison, corrupting kindness and compassion.
h5be2a77eg400cg4397ga7cbga5e8f3b2fa55: Perhaps you'll understand me better when you know the truth of my condition.
hb0378ba0g8d1ag4ad4g9fe3gfc115cbd7bd9: Perhaps when you know the truth, you'll regret wanting me to stay.
h2007d775g2d6eg443agb7e5g051180f64dbb: Come find me another night, and I'll tell you everything.
hcaf5cd69g5324g496eg80b9g4e4f0dfcebaa: Tonight I need to wash my hands of blood and my mind of shattering memories.
ha1f7ca28g2cb4g4fe5ga6f6g852b708564da: At what cost? Are our lives truly worth so many others?
hcee2637fg4835g4fb3g8f9eg39986e829d30: I can see the answer in your eyes. And that's why I'm leaving.
hd8ce01ceg8f81g4feeg92e4g21a42061bc84: You don't stand a chance alone. You're free to go. I dare you.
h0edd8226g97e6g4706ga835gd0d90c80d867: Gods damn you - you're right. Few things are more powerful than the will to live.
h46cc772ag046eg49b3g9682g51efc5922ff2: What chances I have, I'll take them. I'd rather roll the dice than deliver all this death.
h853b9370ga423g4413ga05fg0a650c3c1477: Yes. And I got you the Idol of Silvanus along the way.
h5d705030g5475g4f32gbf48g6fec021d84c8: I'm sorry you feel that way.
h25b2dc20g5bcfg4444gaf38gcaa7855334da: It's time to stop making excuses.
h6735e962g0259g4cc8gbb3cg596f1a96cd5a: You make your own choices. Don't blame me for their outcomes.
h364a1c08gd045g464egb354g7c78e985b753: Don't blame me for detesting them.
hb6c8064bg2cabg4cb5gb2c5g856202e17977: Quiet whining. You're killing the mood.
h06a7b875ga628g46efg9b88g904315a45aff: You really are absolutely heartless, aren't you?
h88fb5e49gb743g43f6gbf4dg5084de8c46c4: You've seen your own true nature. Accept it.
hf46176d1gb6e8g4068g8fc3g0bb3704a9672: Perhaps we've gone too far, but what's done is done.
